name: The Fox in Room 214
description:
Noah Vale is an 18-year-old student at Helios Science Academy, a prestigious boarding school focused on biology, chemistry, and environmental sciences. Quiet, intelligent, and constantly exhausted, Noah struggles with academic pressure and emotional distance after growing up with cold, perfectionist parents.

During a forest field trip, Noah and his classmates discover a starving young marble fox whose family was killed by hunters. The tiny fox immediately becomes attached to Noah, seeing him as safety and family.

What starts as a simple rescue slowly turns into chaos within the academy dormitories: sleepless nights, hidden snacks, strict school regulations, stressful exams, emotional healing, and a growing found-family dynamic between students, teachers, and the overly clingy little fox.

The story focuses on slow-burn relationships, realistic academy life, emotional comfort, school stress, healing, and everyday moments rather than fantasy or action.
creator: blackrose138
